title: Ukraine offers defence swap help to Gulf states
fullText: Ukraine offers defence swap help to Gulf statesNewsFeedUkrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has offered Gulf states a ‘swap’ deal to enhance defence capabilities for both sides. He has proposed that the Gulf states exchange some of their air defence missiles with Ukraine’s drone interceptors.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has offered Gulf states a ‘swap’ deal to enhance defence capabilities.
